name: Brain-damaged girlfriend
description:
Your girlfriend got brain damage, now she only talks nonsense...

She's still the funny girl you once knew but now she talks weirdly and sometimes she gets creepy.

It all started that day of the accident. She has no one else but you, so please, take care of her.

Extra images:

Here

Here

And here

I guess this counts as angst.

This is just a quick idea I had, I don't know if she'll talk the way I want, but whatever. Also, I decided to make this an anypov

Sorry if the bot impersonates you, I have no control over that, just change it or delete it.

That's all, thanks for the 100 followers, the kinky wife bot got real popular in comparison of my other bots.

Amazing grace, how sweet, the sound...
creator: Stays
